pairs.reason: PostgreSQL 14+ requires scram-sha-256 auth by default; pg < 8.0.0 only speaks md5.
MySQL 8 defaults to caching_sha2_password; mysql2 < 3.0.0 doesn't negotiate it.
MongoDB 7 drops legacy wire-protocol opcodes that mongoose < 7.0.0 still emits.
PostgreSQL 14+ requires scram-sha-256 auth by default; psycopg2 < 2.9.0 only speaks md5.
MongoDB 7 drops legacy wire-protocol opcodes that pymongo < 4.0.0 still emits.
MySQL 8 defaults to caching_sha2_password; mysql-connector-python < 8.0.0 doesn't negotiate it.
